title: The Stuff of Legend
description: Dive into a carefully balanced adventure that offers a consistent Vanilla-like experience while taking it to the next level with refined mechanics
body:
This modpack aims to design a carefully balanced gameplay that remains consistent with the base game, while enhancing its mechanics. With its carefully configured mods, you can dive straight into the action without needing a guidebook to learn again how to play Minecraft. Everything is meant to be intuitive, following the functionalities already in place. - Take part in great adventures without feeling completely out of place. Cross over new lands that retain the familiar feeling you're used to. Overcome revamped dungeons as well as exciting new ones. The Nether and End dimensions have been overhauled too. - Face more dangerous and varied foes (or adorable critters) with increasing difficulty as you progress. As well as reworked bosses with deadly abilities. A bunch of achievements have also been implemented to provide a wider range of goals to accomplish and to guide you in your journey. - Become more powerful and versatile by applying a wider variety of enchantments to your equipment. Use new weapons and unique items to gain specific advantages that will help you in all kinds of situations. Master a more challenging combat system inspired by the snapshots to crush your enemies even more effectively. - You can easily bring your friends along to your singleplayer worlds with handy multiplayer features. Your fellow pets and mounts also benefit from some QoL features that make them less frustrating. - Experience a wider variety of visual effects, musics and ambient sounds, immersing you in a livelier atmosphere. - Rediscover a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay thanks to a range of quality-of-life features:
QoL summary - World Map ('m') - Minimap (' , ') - Full controller support - Reacharound block placement - Extended Locator Bar - Gravestones - Sit on slabs and stairs - Improved third person view - Crawl ('x') - Protected pets from PvP - Dynamic lighting (even without shaders) when holding an item which emits light - Hands-free belt lantern ('b') - Makes golden armor trims pacify piglins - More comprehensive tooltips - Inventory sorting and quick transfers - Keybind to zoom if you have a spyglass in your inventory ('w') - New inventory slot for totems or artifacts - True step-assist instead of auto-jump (can be disabled) - Improved Recipe Book - Farm tweaks (no trempling, fast right click harvest, ...) - Open double doors together - Click through Signs and Item Frames - More practical mounts - Improved usage of bundles - Some menus have been redesigned with new management options for resource packs, shader packs, data packs and gamerules - New HUD elements for greater insight - Auto switch elytra when double jumping and firework takeoff from the ground - Some Bedrock features ported - Simulated ticking in unloaded chunks or when sleeping - Automatically plants sapling drops when they fall on the ground - Fast leaf decay - More usable map item and improved display of player indicators - And so much more!
![A view of a snow-capped mountain, surrounded by a plain and a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dMb43wJJ/images/7592110cd124e96eb89a26a0ee7d64596944a17a.jpeg) And finally, for those who have a decent enough machine, [Complementary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shader is directly integrated with custom settings that shape a unique visual aesthetic which fits the modpack perfectly. And it comes with four different performance presets.
